heroSub: When the work is done, the whole site belongs to you: the code, the GitHub repo, and the Netlify account. There is no lock-in, and nothing to pay every month.
hourlyLine: Need changes later on? You pay by the hour. The first hour is $50 and every hour after that is $75, with a 1-hour minimum.

valueProps.title: You own it
valueProps.body: The code sits in your own GitHub and deploys from your own Netlify. Once the site is built, all of it transfers to you.

valueProps.title: No ongoing costs
valueProps.body: Static sites run on Netlify's free tier, so hosting costs $0 a month. You pay me to build the site, and after that it costs nothing to keep online.

valueProps.title: Edit it yourself
valueProps.body: I can set up a simple visual editor for the parts you'll update most, like a blog or portfolio, so you can post and tweak those yourself without going near the code. Bigger changes, I handle.

valueProps.title: Work with me directly
valueProps.body: You deal with me, not a sales team or a support queue. Clear pricing, and a real person answering your email.

runningCosts.heading: What it costs to keep the site running: $0 a month.
runningCosts.intro: Most web shops put you on a subscription, with hosting fees, platform fees, and maintenance retainers that bill every month whether you need anything or not. I work differently. A few reasons your site stays free to run:

points.label: Free hosting that stays free
points.detail: Your site is plain HTML, CSS, and images, which Netlify's free tier serves at no cost. There is no usage meter and no bill waiting at the end of the month.

points.label: Nothing to maintain
points.detail: With no database or server running behind it, there is nothing to patch, renew, or pay for, and nothing that can quietly run up a charge.

points.label: The accounts are yours
points.detail: The GitHub repo and the Netlify project are both in your name, so no middleman sits between you and your own site.

points.label: Pay only when you change it
points.detail: When you want an update, you pay for the hour or two it takes and nothing else. There is never a recurring fee.

closingHeadline: Want a site that's yours to keep?
